children.text: The World If is a new companion to our annual compilation of predictions for the year ahead, The World In... Instead of forecasts, it has scenarios. Just suppose...
The World in 2015, the latest in The Economist's annual collection of predictions, identifies and explores the issues that will shape the year ahead.
2014 was a year of political shocks, sporting shows and economic shifts. Read The World in 2014, an annual set of predictions published by The Economist
